text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Patient alert, oriented and cooperative; dyspnoic, tachypnoic, wheezing with use of accessory muscles, worsened by walking short distances and speaking.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "No angina at the time of the visit.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "BP 200/100 mmHg, HR 90 bpmR, sO2 84% on room air, apyretic.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Hypohydrated mucous membranes, jugular veins difficult to assess.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Cardiac examination: muffled, tachyarrhythmic tones, poorly assessable pauses.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Pulmonary examination: diffusely reduced breath sounds, scattered wheezing and hissing, bibasilar crackles.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Abdominal examination: distended, palpable, not tender or painful, peristalsis +.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "Lower limbs: mild bilateral peripheral edema.", 0.0, 0.5)
